W

WATER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.player.ShotResult
The shot landed on an empty cell; the shooter's turn ends.
WATER_HEIGHT - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
Thickness of the water sheet.
Water3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
Represents a single water cell of the board (an empty cell with no ship).
Water3D(int, int) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.assets.Water3D
 
waterMaterial() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
 
waterMiss(int, int) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.ShotMark3D
Miss shot on the water: a red "X" made of two crossed cylinders.
WreckageDebris3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
A scattered cluster of broken hull fragments with fire and smoke, shown on a cell where a ship has been hit -- replaces the old plain scorch mark with something that reads as an actual wreck.
WreckageDebris3D() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
 
WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec - Record Class in com.example.battleship.view.assets
One fragment: position, size, and how it's tipped over.
writeTriangle(int[], int, int, int, int) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.HoverMarker3D
Writes one triangle's three (point, texCoord) index pairs into faces starting at startIndex, and returns the next free index.
